findings.title: Missing timeout-minutes in fix-articles.yml job 'fix'
findings.detail: Without a timeout, a hung workflow can consume Actions minutes indefinitely.

findings.title: '*.pem' not in .gitignore
findings.detail: SSL/TLS private keys could be accidentally committed.
findings.fix_prompt: Add '*.pem' to .gitignore to prevent accidental commit of ssl/tls private keys.

findings.title: '*.key' not in .gitignore
findings.detail: Private key files could be accidentally committed.
findings.fix_prompt: Add '*.key' to .gitignore to prevent accidental commit of private key files.

findings.title: 'credentials.json' not in .gitignore
findings.detail: Google Cloud credentials could be accidentally committed.
findings.fix_prompt: Add 'credentials.json' to .gitignore to prevent accidental commit of google cloud credentials.
